---
title: "indicspecies"
format: html
theme: 
  light: zephyr
  dark: cyborg
toc: true
page-layout: full
number-sections: true
number-depth: 3
editor: visual
self-contained: true
---

# Load pkgs

```{r}
pacman::p_load("tidyverse",
               "indicspecies",
               "vegan",
               "compositions",
               "janitor",
               cowplot)
```

# Load data

```{r}
# DIVs
divs <- 
  read_tsv("../DIVs.txt",col_names = T) |> 
  pull(div)

# ITS2 sequences
its2 <- 
  read_tsv("../raw_data/20250829T091611/post_med_seqs/4_first_analysis_20250829T091611.seqs.absolute.abund_and_meta.txt")

its2_1 <- 
  its2 |> 
  drop_na()  |> 
  filter(post_med_unique != 0) |> 
  select(!c(1, 3:39))

sample_clean <- # samples with ITS2
  its2_1 |> 
  pull(sample_name)

its2_2 <-
  its2_1 |>
  pivot_longer(!sample_name,
               names_to = "its2",
               values_to = "count") |> 
  filter(its2 %in% divs)

# Metadata
metadata <- 
  read_csv("metadata_all_clean.csv")

metadata_1 <- # clean meatdata
  metadata |> 
  filter(sample_name %in% sample_clean) |> 
  arrange(sample_name)

its2_3 <- 
  its2_2 |> 
  left_join(metadata_1)
```

# ISA

Species.

```{r}
its2_isa <- 
  its2_2 |> 
  pivot_wider(names_from = "its2",
              values_from = "count") |> 
  arrange(sample_name) |> 
  column_to_rownames("sample_name")

its2_isa_species_meta <- 
  metadata_1 |> 
  arrange(sample_name) |> 
  pull(species) |> 
  factor()

# Run ISA
its2_isa_species <- 
  multipatt(its2_isa, its2_isa_species_meta, 
                    control = how(nperm=999),
            duleg = TRUE)

its2_isa_species_sum <- 
  its2_isa_species$sign |> 
  filter(p.value <= 0.05 & stat >= 0.5) |> 
  rownames_to_column("its2") |> 
  pivot_longer(!c(its2, p.value, index, stat),
               names_to = "species",
               values_to = "count") |> 
  filter(count != 0)

summary(its2_isa_species, indvalcomp = TRUE)

# Indicator ITS2
its2_indicator_species <- 
  its2_isa_species_sum |> 
  pull(its2)
```

Region.

```{r}
its2_isa_region_meta <- 
  metadata_1 |> 
  arrange(sample_name) |> 
  pull(region) |> 
  factor()

# Run ISA
its2_isa_region <- 
  multipatt(its2_isa, its2_isa_region_meta, 
                    control = how(nperm=999),
            duleg = TRUE)

its2_isa_region_sum <- 
  its2_isa_region$sign |> 
  filter(p.value <= 0.05 & stat >= 0.5) |> 
  rownames_to_column("its2") |> 
  pivot_longer(!c(its2, p.value, index, stat),
               names_to = "region",
               values_to = "count") |> 
  filter(count != 0)

summary(its2_isa_region, indvalcomp = TRUE)

# Indicator ITS2
its2_indicator_region <- 
  its2_isa_region_sum |> 
  pull(its2)
```

Biogeographic region.

```{r}
its2_isa_bio_region_meta <- 
  metadata_1 |> 
  arrange(sample_name) |> 
  pull(bio_region) |> 
  factor()

# Run ISA
its2_isa_bio_region <- 
  multipatt(its2_isa, its2_isa_bio_region_meta, 
                    control = how(nperm=999),
            duleg = TRUE)

its2_isa_bio_region_sum <- 
  its2_isa_bio_region$sign |> 
  filter(p.value <= 0.05 & stat >= 0.5) |> 
  rownames_to_column("its2") |> 
  pivot_longer(!c(its2, p.value, index, stat),
               names_to = "bio_region",
               values_to = "count") |> 
  filter(count != 0)

summary(its2_isa_bio_region, indvalcomp = TRUE)

# Indicator ITS2
its2_indicator_bio_region <- 
  its2_isa_bio_region_sum |> 
  pull(its2)
```

Thermal regime.

```{r}
its2_isa_thermal_cluster_meta <- 
  metadata_1 |> 
  arrange(sample_name) |> 
  pull(thermal_cluster) |> 
  factor()

# Run ISA
its2_isa_thermal_cluster <- 
  multipatt(its2_isa, its2_isa_thermal_cluster_meta, 
                    control = how(nperm=999),
            duleg = TRUE)

its2_isa_thermal_cluster_sum <- 
  its2_isa_thermal_cluster$sign |> 
  filter(p.value <= 0.05 & stat >= 0.5) |> 
  rownames_to_column("its2") |> 
  pivot_longer(!c(its2, p.value, index, stat),
               names_to = "thermal_cluster",
               values_to = "count") |> 
  filter(count != 0)

summary(its2_isa_thermal_cluster, indvalcomp = TRUE)

# Indicator ITS2
its2_indicator_thermal_cluster <- 
  its2_isa_thermal_cluster_sum |> 
  pull(its2)
```

# Z-score

## Tidy & plot

Species.

```{r}
its2_species <- 
  its2_3 |> 
  filter(its2 %in% its2_indicator_species) |> 
  group_by(species, its2) |>
  summarise(total = mean(count)) |> 
  ungroup() |> 
  group_by(its2) |> 
  mutate(rel_abun = total/sum(total)) |> 
  mutate(
    z = (rel_abun - mean(rel_abun)) / sd(rel_abun)
  ) |> 
  ungroup() |> 
  mutate(genus = str_extract(its2, "[A-Za-z]+"))

its2_species_max <- max(abs(its2_species$z))

its2_species_plot <- 
  its2_species |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = fct_relevel(species,
                             c("Hpor",
                               "Hhip",
                               "Tgig",
                               "Tder",
                               "Tmax",
                               "Tnoa",
                               "Tsqu",
                               "Tcro")),
             y = its2, fill = z)) +
  geom_raster() +
  scale_fill_distiller(
    palette = "RdBu",
    direction = -1,
    limits = c(-its2_species_max, its2_species_max)
  ) +
  facet_grid(rows = vars(genus),
             scales = "free",
             space = "free") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(panel.grid = element_blank(),
        axis.text = element_text(size = 7),
        axis.title = element_blank(),
        panel.spacing = unit(0.1, "lines"),
        legend.position = "bottom") +
  coord_fixed(ratio = 0.5)
```

Region.

```{r}
its2_region <- 
  its2_3 |> 
  filter(its2 %in% its2_indicator_region) |> 
  group_by(region, its2) |>
  summarise(total = mean(count)) |> 
  ungroup() |> 
  group_by(its2) |> 
  mutate(rel_abun = total/sum(total)) |> 
  mutate(
    z = (rel_abun - mean(rel_abun)) / sd(rel_abun)
  ) |> 
  ungroup() |> 
  mutate(genus = str_extract(its2, "[A-Za-z]+"))

its2_region_max <- max(abs(its2_region$z))

its2_region_plot <- 
  its2_region |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = fct_relevel(region,
                             c("Cal",
                               "Sam",
                               "Ant",
                               "Pal",
                               "Ala",
                               "ARN",
                               "Bat",
                               "Bol",
                               "Zam",
                               "Cam",
                               "Boh")),
             y = its2, fill = z)) +
  geom_raster() +
  scale_fill_distiller(
    palette = "RdBu",
    direction = -1,
    limits = c(-its2_region_max, its2_region_max)
  ) +
  facet_grid(rows = vars(genus),
             scales = "free",
             space = "free") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(panel.grid = element_blank(),
        axis.text = element_text(size = 7),
        axis.title = element_blank(),
        panel.spacing = unit(0.1, "lines"),
        legend.position = "bottom") +
  coord_fixed(ratio = 0.5)
```

Biogeographic region.

```{r}
its2_bio_region <- 
  its2_3 |> 
  filter(its2 %in% its2_indicator_bio_region) |> 
  group_by(bio_region, its2) |>
  summarise(total = mean(count)) |> 
  ungroup() |> 
  group_by(its2) |> 
  mutate(rel_abun = total/sum(total)) |> 
  mutate(
    z = (rel_abun - mean(rel_abun)) / sd(rel_abun)
  ) |> 
  ungroup() |> 
  mutate(genus = str_extract(its2, "[A-Za-z]+"))

its2_bio_region_max <- max(abs(its2_bio_region$z))

its2_bio_region_plot <- 
  its2_bio_region |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = bio_region,
             y = its2, fill = z)) +
  geom_raster() +
  scale_fill_distiller(
    palette = "RdBu",
    direction = -1,
    limits = c(-its2_bio_region_max, its2_bio_region_max)
  ) +
  facet_grid(rows = vars(genus),
             scales = "free",
             space = "free") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(panel.grid = element_blank(),
        axis.text = element_text(size = 7),
        axis.title = element_blank(),
        panel.spacing = unit(0.1, "lines"),
        legend.position = "bottom") +
  coord_fixed(ratio = 0.5)
```

Thermal regime.

```{r}
its2_thermal_cluster <- 
  its2_3 |> 
  filter(its2 %in% its2_indicator_thermal_cluster) |> 
  group_by(thermal_cluster, its2) |>
  summarise(total = mean(count)) |> 
  ungroup() |> 
  group_by(its2) |> 
  mutate(rel_abun = total/sum(total)) |> 
  mutate(
    z = (rel_abun - mean(rel_abun)) / sd(rel_abun)
  ) |> 
  ungroup() |> 
  mutate(genus = str_extract(its2, "[A-Za-z]+"))

its2_thermal_cluster_max <- max(abs(its2_thermal_cluster$z))

its2_thermal_cluster_plot <- 
  its2_thermal_cluster |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = thermal_cluster,
             y = its2, fill = z)) +
  geom_raster() +
  scale_fill_distiller(
    palette = "RdBu",
    direction = -1,
    limits = c(-its2_thermal_cluster_max, its2_thermal_cluster_max)
  ) +
  facet_grid(rows = vars(genus),
             scales = "free",
             space = "free") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(panel.grid = element_blank(),
        axis.text = element_text(size = 7),
        axis.title = element_blank(),
        panel.spacing = unit(0.1, "lines"),
        legend.position = "bottom") +
  coord_fixed(ratio = 0.5)
```

Merge.

```{r}
its2_isa_plot_merged <- 
  plot_grid(its2_species_plot,
            its2_region_plot,
            its2_bio_region_plot,
            its2_thermal_cluster_plot,
            axis = "tblr", 
            align = "hv")
```

Save.

```{r}
its2_isa_plot_merged |> 
  ggsave(filename = "isa_all.svg", 
         dpi = 900,
         width = 18, 
         height = 17,
         unit = "cm")
```
